title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at TNT India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at TNT India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at TNT India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About TNT India:
TNT India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TNT India!
